title: AXMinLengthValidationRule
description: Validation rule class that ensures a string value meets a minimum length requirement.

types.title: AXMinLengthValidationRule

props.name: options
props.description: Configuration options for the minimum length validation rule.

types.description: Validation rule that checks if a string value has at least the specified minimum length.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates that the string length is greater than or equal to the minimum length.

methods.name: validateAsync
methods.description: Asynchronously validates that the string length is greater than or equal to the minimum length.

methods.name: setMinLength
methods.description: Sets the minimum required length for validation.

methods.name: getMinLength
methods.description: Returns the current minimum length requirement.
